description_long: This is a yellow and black DeWalt 12V Max cordless electric drill, featuring a robust plastic and metal construction. The drill has a prominent pistol-grip handle with a textured surface for secure handling, and a visible trigger button just above the grip. The front section houses a gray, cylindrical chuck with a hollow center, currently without a drill bit attached. The base of the handle contains a detachable battery pack labeled '12V Lithium Ion,' which is slightly bulkier than the handle itself. The body displays several molded details, including ventilation slots, brand logos, and safety labels, giving it a realistic and functional appearance.
description: A yellow and black DeWalt 12V Max cordless electric drill with a textured grip, visible trigger, and detachable battery pack. The front features a gray chuck with no drill bit attached.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWalt logo, trigger button, and the full length of the handle and battery pack.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the top of the drill body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying safety labels, ventilation slots, and the battery pack from a different angle.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the gray chuck with a hollow center and the DeWalt logo on the battery pack.
